description_long: This is a small, cylindrical brown plastic bottle with a white screw-on cap and a wide, matte-finish label wrapped around its midsection. The label on the front displays the text 'EASY LIGHT' and additional product information in a minimalist, light gray font. The bottle's surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with the cap featuring subtle ridges for grip. The label covers most of the bottle's circumference, with only the front side showing detailed branding and product information, while the back and sides are mostly blank. The bottle is likely filled with a lotion or liquid, as suggested by its size and packaging style. This type of container is commonly found in personal care or cosmetic contexts, suitable for urban environments such as bathrooms, gyms, or travel kits.
description: A small brown plastic bottle with a white screw-on cap and a wide, matte label featuring minimalist branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label with 'EASY LIGHT' branding and product details clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the label visible but no branding or text, just a blank section of the label.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a blank section of the label with no visible text.
description_view_3: Rear view with the label fully visible but no branding or text, just a plain label surface.
